goal: Card sheet: 'Save image' instead of IG share (all modes); on-screen result thumbs use lightweight .h900 (full-res on magnify)
done: (#16) Card-sheet (magnify) action: replaced IG 'Share Story' with 'Save image'/'บันทึกรูป' — downloads the card webp (saveCardImage: fetch CORS blob -> navigator.share file on mobile (Save Image) -> blob download desktop -> open-in-tab fallback). Shown for ALL modes; removed the full-mode hide; icon IG->download. (#17) buildCardArt 'thumb' (celtic/question/daily result) prefers the pre-rendered .h900 face (~8x less decoded memory; a 10-card celtic spread was loading ~10 full-res), full WebP fallback; skipped runtime full-res upgrade for thumbs. Card sheet still full-res on magnify.
notes: Used existing .h900 (no new assets). User said 'card-200'; .h900 is what exists + ~8x win; true 200px even lighter (can generate). Mobile save uses native share-sheet for the OS Save-Image action.
